pages.text: $(l)Mana Bloom$() scatters mystical generating flowers across the battlefield.$(br2)$(l)Max Level:$() 5$(br)$(l)Type:$() Utility$(br)$(l)Botania Mana Cost:$() 10,000 + 10,000/level$(br2)At higher levels, more flowers are spawned across a wider area. The flowers are temporary and vanish after a short time, but they generate small amounts of Botania mana while active.
